mapper.sql: pause_id AS pauseId, user_id AS userId, card_order_id AS cardOrderId, pause_month AS pauseMonth, pause_days AS pauseDays, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, status, created_date AS createdDate
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO card_pause_record
user_id, card_order_id, pause_month, pause_days, start_time, end_time, status,
#{userId}, #{cardOrderId}, #{pauseMonth}, #{pauseDays}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status},
mapper.select: SELECT cardOrderId, userId, status, validityDate FROM card_order WHERE cardOrderId = #{cardOrderId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM card_pause_record WHERE card_order_id = #{cardOrderId} AND pause_month = #{pauseMonth}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM card_pause_record WHERE card_order_id = #{cardOrderId} AND pause_month LIKE #{yearPrefix}
SELECT FROM card_pause_record WHERE pause_id = #{pauseId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE card_pause_record SET end_time = #{endTime}, pause_days = #{pauseDays}, status = 1 WHERE pause_id = #{pauseId} AND status = 0
